model.addMoreModel: Go to settings to add more models
model.params.frequency_penaltyTip:
How much to penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far.
Decreases the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim.
model.params.maxTokenSettingTip: Your max token setting is high, potentially limiting space for prompts, queries, and data. Consider setting it below 2/3.
model.params.max_tokensTip:
Used to limit the maximum length of the reply, in tokens. 
Larger values may limit the space left for prompt words, chat logs, and Knowledge. 
It is recommended to set it below two-thirds
gpt-4-1106-preview, gpt-4-vision-preview max token (input 128k output 4k)
model.params.presence_penaltyTip:
How much to penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far.
Increases the model's likelihood to talk about new topics.
model.params.setToCurrentModelMaxTokenTi: Max token is updated to the 80% maximum token of the current model {{maxToken}}.
model.params.stop_sequencesTip: Up to four sequences where the API will stop generating further tokens. The returned text will not contain the stop sequence.
model.params.temperatureTip: Controls randomness: Lowering results in less random completions. As the temperature approaches zero, the model will become deterministic and repetitive.
model.params.top_pTip: Controls diversity via nucleus sampling: 0.5 means half of all likelihood-weighted options are considered.

modelProvider.embeddingModel.tip: Set the default model for document embedding processing of the Knowledge, both retrieval and import of the Knowledge use this Embedding model for vectorization processing. Switching will cause the vector dimension between the imported Knowledge and the question to be inconsistent, resulting in retrieval failure. To avoid retrieval failure, please do not switch this model at will.

modelProvider.loadBalancingInfo: By default, load balancing uses the Round-robin strategy. If rate limiting is triggered, a 1-minute cooldown period will be applied.

modelProvider.rerankModel.tip: Rerank model will reorder the candidate document list based on the semantic match with  user query, improving the results of semantic ranking

settings.channelsDescription: Manage inbound channels and route each channel to the right workflow app.
settings.channelsWebhookDescription: Configure Meta webhook routing so Facebook Page messages and comments can trigger your app automatically.
settings.channelsMessengerNotInstalled: Messenger provider is not installed yet.
settings.channelsRequiredError: Please fill in all required fields.
settings.channelsSecretRequiredError: Please provide verify token and client secret for new channels.
settings.channelsComingSoonError: This provider setup is coming soon.
settings.channelsComingSoonWarning: This provider is in preview mode. Runtime event handling will be enabled in the next phase.
settings.channelsEditVerifyTokenPlacehol: Leave empty to keep current verify token, or enter a new token.
settings.channelsTargetAppHint: Select the Dify app that will receive messages from this channel.
settings.channelsChannelIdHint: Use a stable unique ID (for example: zalo-oa-12345 or tiktok-shop-001).
settings.channelsVerifyTokenHint: Used to verify callback requests from the provider platform.
settings.channelsFacebookPageIdHint: Auto-filled after selecting a Facebook page above.
settings.channelsInstagramResourceHint: Use Instagram Business Account ID linked to your Meta app.
settings.channelsTikTokResourceHint: Use TikTok account/business resource ID from your developer app.
settings.channelsZaloResourceHint: Use OA ID from Zalo Official Account settings.
settings.channelsGenericClientSecretHint: Secret from provider developer console. Keep it private.
settings.channelsGenericAccessTokenHint: Token used by Dify to call provider APIs on your behalf.
settings.channelsZaloAppSecretHint: Paste the secret key used for X-ZEvent-Signature webhook verification in Zalo Developer (usually under Official Account/Webhook; some newer UIs expose it as Application's private key).
settings.channelsZaloTokenHint: Access token is issued automatically after Connect with Zalo (QR).
settings.channelsZaloOAuthAppIdHint: Application ID from Zalo Developer for your OA app (developers.zalo.me).
settings.channelsZaloOAuthAppIdRequired: Please enter your Zalo Developer application ID.
settings.channelsZaloCallbackUrlHint: Register this exact URL as Callback URL in Zalo Developer for your app (same host as TRIGGER_URL / webhook base).
settings.channelsZaloQRHint: Scan the QR code with your phone or open the link, sign in to Zalo, and approve access for your OA.
settings.channelsZaloOAuthTimeout: Authorization timed out. Close this dialog and try again.
settings.channelsApiVersionHint: Only required for providers that version their Graph/API endpoints.
settings.channelsWebhookUrlHint: Paste this URL into Meta App Dashboard > Messenger > Webhooks > Callback URL.
settings.channelsWebhookVerifyTokenHint: Paste this token into Meta App Dashboard > Verify token.
settings.channelsMetaWebhookFieldsHint: In Meta, subscribe to message fields (messages, messaging_postbacks, messaging_seen). For Facebook comment automation, also subscribe to Page feed events (comment changes).
settings.channelsZaloWebhookUrlHint: Paste this URL into Zalo Developer > OA Webhook callback URL.
settings.channelsZaloWebhookFieldsHint: In Zalo Developer, enable text-message webhook events and use OA Secret Key as client_secret in this form.
settings.channelsFacebookAppIdHint: Copy from Meta App Dashboard > App settings.
settings.channelsFacebookAppSecretHint: Copy from Meta App Dashboard > App settings > Show secret.
settings.channelsFacebookAppSecretFormat: Facebook App Secret looks invalid. Do not paste an access token (EAAT...). Use App Secret from Meta App settings.
settings.channelsFacebookCredentialRequi: Please enter Facebook App ID and App Secret first.
settings.channelsFacebookNoPagesFound: No Facebook pages found for this account.
settings.channelsMessengerConnectRequire: Connect Facebook and select a page before saving this channel.
settings.channelsProviderSecretRequiredE: Please provide app secret/client secret for this channel.
settings.channelsProviderTokenRequiredEr: Please provide access token for this channel.
settings.channelsGenericSetupHint: Finish this provider's OAuth and callback/webhook setup in its platform console, then continue routing fields below.
settings.channelsZaloSetupHint: For Zalo OA: complete app setup, domain verification, and webhook callback URL on Zalo Developer. You can either paste an OA access token below (manual) or leave it empty and use Connect with Zalo (scan QR) after saving.

settings.omnichannelPageSubtitle: Unified inbox with conversation-first workflow, operational controls, and channel health.
settings.omnichannelSelectConversationHi: Select a conversation to view messages.
settings.omnichannelLoadOlderHint: Scroll up to load older messages.
settings.omnichannelSyncNoDatesMessenger: Leave both dates empty for a full-window import. Facebook Messenger channels first refresh every conversation contact name and profile photo from Meta, then import messages from Graph (up to the configured limit).
settings.omnichannelSyncHistoryNotSuppor: Bulk history sync is only available for Facebook Messenger and Instagram DM. Zalo OA and other channels receive new messages via webhook—set the callback URL in Zalo Developers (Official Account → Webhook) and finish OA linking + OAuth under Settings → Channels.

settings.omnichannelErrorPollSync: Failed to poll sync history job.
settings.omnichannelErrorStartSync: Failed to start sync history job.
